body.title: SuperClaude: name sessions hostname+yymmdd.hhmmss, enable remote control
body.result: SESSION_NAME=hostname-yymmdd.HHMMSS; passed as -n (display name) and --remote-control handle. Both tmux and non-tmux paths updated.
body.description:
SuperClaude (UnseenUniversity/bin/superclaude) should name each Claude Code session using hostname+yymmdd.hhmmss at launch time, then enable remote control so Igor and other tools can reach the session by name. Currently uses a static or unset session name.

**Affected files:** UnseenUniversity/bin/superclaude
**Design rules:** none
**Scope boundary:** IN — set session name on launch using $(hostname)-$(date +%y%m%d.%H%M%S) pattern; pass --session-name or equivalent Claude Code flag for remote control; OUT — do not change any other superclaude behavior or the setup wizard
**Test plan:** Start superclaude; tmux session name matches hostname-yymmdd.hhmmss pattern; Claude Code session reachable by that name via remote control; existing superclaude flags still work
